zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard of Lexington於1165年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾圖福德時，他的父親Robert Lexington35歲，母親Mrs. Robert Lexington15歲。他和Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1250年6月4日在英國英格蘭享年85歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾拉可頓。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard of Lexington was born in 1165, in Tuxford, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Robert Lexington, was 35 and his mother, Mrs. Robert Lexington, was 15. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England. He died on 4 June 1250, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85, and was buried in Laxton, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard of Lexington est né en 1165, à Tuxford, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Lexington, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Robert Lexington, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1250, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Laxton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard of Lexingtonが1165年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアトゥクスフォードで生まれた時，父Robert Lexingtonは35歳，母Mrs. Robert Lexingtonは15歳であった。彼はMatilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, Englandとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1250年6月4日にイギリスイギリスで85歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアラクストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard of Lexington(이)가 1165년 영국 노틴그함실르 투스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Lexington(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Robert Lexington(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 6월 4일 영국 잉글랜드에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 라스턴에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard of Lexington родился в 1165 г. в местности туксфорд, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Lexington было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Robert Lexington, 15. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England. Он умер 4 июня 1250 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности лакстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия.
